caribbean.headline: Grand Cayman Faces Heavy Rain, Moderate Seas Today
caribbean.paragraph: Grand Cayman is expecting 100% rain probability with southeast swell building to 6.3 feet and 8-second periods under 18-knot winds. Cozumel remains quieter with 13-knot winds, making it the more favorable option for operations in the western Caribbean today.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Remains Settled; Mild Conditions Persist
mediterranean.paragraph: Venice is experiencing light winds at 16 knots with modest seas of 2.6 feet and 38% rain probability, reflecting typical early-season Mediterranean conditions. Cadiz in the western basin shows similar benign patterns with matching 16-knot winds, allowing cruise operations to proceed without disruption across both regions.
